title: Compose (v2 authoring kind)
description: The `compose` operator — authoring surface for user-defined derivations. Lets operators declare new kinds as compositions of the 6 primitives (or extensions of stdlib kinds). See docs/compose-from-primitives.md for the authoring guide.

name.description: The composed kind's name. Capital-first, no underscores (e.g. 'ContractClause', 'CodeReviewSession').

namespace.description: Dotted namespace for the composed kind (e.g. 'legal.acme'). Prevents cross-branch name collisions.

compose.description: The composition expression — a list of primitive or stdlib-extension slots. Slots merge into a single kind. Field collisions require !override on one side.

interface.description: Declared interface for this kind — fields exposed to other composables. Used by interface-check at weave lint time.
